title: Animal Garden - Sugar Glider
description: This mod adds the tamable Sugar Glider as a mob into your world.
body:
This mod adds the Sugar Glider as a mob into your world.

You can tame, and breed them with any food item as they are omnivorous.

When tamed if there is a mob around that is targeting their owner, then they will start to scream to tell their owner that there is danger nearby.



It has 3 type of behavior that can be changed after taming.

-wandering(will not follow the player),

-standing (stands up and waits until attacked or gets another behavior command)

-following owner



Untamed ones will sometimes just stand up for a while at a random time and they will run away from others except from other Sugar Gliders.

It can climb on any blocks and will float in the direction it is looking when it is in the air.

They will protect themselves when attacked and they can move in groups when not in following mode.

And sweet berries wont damage them.



You can find them in forest biomes.

(In forge you can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack and in fabric there is a config file for it)



Mod currently supports

**Forge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

**Neoforge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**



SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE
